_publications._publicationTitle: A multicenter study of neurofibromatosis type 1 utilizing deep learning for whole body tumor identification.

_contextSnippet: incorporating information from surrounding normal organs/tissues enhanced diagnostic accuracy from 61.90% to 79.37% for MPNST and from 46.67% to 70% for PNF
details: Incorporating surrounding normal organs/tissues enhanced diagnostic accuracy from 61.90% to 79.37% for MPNST and from 46.67% to 70% for PNF
